message:
bd-1365: Add debug_tools scene with Pretty/Inspect demos

- DebugToolsScene demonstrates Pretty and Inspect renderables
- Shows ServiceInfo Pretty output, DemoStateSnapshot Inspect output,
  and FailureEvent context inspection with stack traces
- Adds FailureScenario/FailureEvent types to state.rs (bd-2wxz)
- Fixes clippy double_ended_iterator_last in typography.rs
- Fixes repro_wide_char_overflow test assert format string

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
